creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: fernape
Date: Mon Jan  6 17:02:19 UTC 2020
New revision: 522260
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/522260

Log:
  sysutils/tuptime: update to 4.1.0

  ChangeLog: https://github.com/rfrail3/tuptime/releases/tag/4.1.0

   * Register shutdowns lower than a second
   * Adding option -A --at
   * Refactoring --tat output
   * Rename suspend time to sleep time

  PR:	243081
  Submitted by:	rfraile@rfraile.eu
  Reviewed by:	jeremy@smart-serv.net (maintainer)

Changes:
  head/sysutils/tuptime/Makefile
  head/sysutils/tuptime/distinfo
